modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Icons and screens are zoomed in on primary display.

full_description_text:  
After booting up, all app icons are too big. Everything looks pixelated. This only happens on my main screen, not the second screen.
short_description: Icons and screens are zoomed in on primary display.
description: After booting up, all app icons are too big. Everything looks pixelated. This only happens on my main screen, not the second screen.
